title: Bolsius Tealight Candles - Clear Cup - White - Box of 24 Transparent Tealights - Long Burning Time of 6 Hours - Unscented - Smokeless - Includes Natural Vegan Wax - No Palm Oil, Packaging May Vary
features: Tea lights work really well for bringing a bit of cosiness into your home! These BOLSIUS tea lights in a transparent cup have a long burning time (up to 6 hours) and come in a box of 24 tea lights. Made with love for people and planet: with natural vegan wax, palm oil free and in a recycleble bag and cup.

With tea lights you are not only adding a tranquil and warm ambience, but you can also add an extra touch to your table when combining them in a nice tea light holder. Enjoy the magic of natural light!
The mark of a quality candle is its long burning time and its use of the best raw materials.

Every Bolsius candle is made with skilled craftsmanship and with a sharp focus on quality. The candles don't soot and there's no smoulder or smoke when you burn the candles. That means you can enjoy atmospheric candlelight in your home for a long time!
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius Tea Lights The sustainable Bolsius tealights made from recycled material burn for a long time, contain no palm oil, and are made with natural, vegan wax. Ideal for burners, or as ambient light in candle holders. Gentle on both people and nature.
